requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Papua New Guinea BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为巴布亚新几内亚BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為巴布亞紐幾內亞BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Papua New Guinea does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route. NISIT (National Institute of Standards and Industrial Technology) is PNG's national standards body and administers product conformity requirements for goods sold or installed in PNG. IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules. PNG project owners, EPCs, PPL connection agreements, and international development-finance institutions (ADB, World Bank) active in PNG energy projects are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite for BESS procurement. The BESS-specific IEC standard IEC 62619 is particularly important given PNG's significant off-grid and microgrid deployment context, where safety evidence must be robust in the absence of proximate emergency services. Exporters should verify the current NISIT regulated-product scope directly with NISIT before shipment.
summary.zh: 巴布亚新几内亚目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径相当。NISIT（国家标准与工业技术研究院）是巴布亚新几内亚的国家标准机构，负责管理在巴布亚新几内亚销售或安装的产品合格评定要求。IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。巴布亚新几内亚项目业主、EPC承包商、PPL并网协议，以及在巴布亚新几内亚能源项目中活跃的国际发展融资机构（亚行、世界银行），预计将以IEC 62619合规作为BESS采购的技术前提。IEC 62619标准尤为重要，因为巴布亚新几内亚有大量离网和微电网部署，在缺乏邻近应急服务的情况下，安全证据须具有充分的稳健性。出口商在出货前应直接向NISIT核实现行NISIT受监管产品范围。
summary.zht: 巴布亞紐幾內亞目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑相當。NISIT（國家標準與工業技術研究院）是巴布亞紐幾內亞的國家標準機構，負責管理在巴布亞紐幾內亞銷售或安裝的產品合格評定要求。IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。巴布亞紐幾內亞項目業主、EPC承包商、PPL併網協議，以及在巴布亞紐幾內亞能源項目中活躍的國際發展融資機構（亞行、世界銀行），預計將以IEC 62619合規作為BESS採購的技術前提。IEC 62619標準尤為重要，因為巴布亞紐幾內亞有大量離網和微電網部署，在缺乏鄰近應急服務的情況下，安全證據須具有充分的穩健性。出口商在出貨前應直接向NISIT核實現行NISIT受監管產品範圍。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in PNG project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation

IEC 63056 — Secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems — Safety requirements for use in off-grid applications (applicable for PNG's widespread off-grid BESS deployments)
NISIT — National Institute of Standards and Industrial Technology (verify current regulated product list directly; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific Technical Regulation as of dataset date)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaced GB/T 36276 as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters. Chinese GB standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in PNG project specifications. For Chinese BESS exported to PNG, IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required in addition to any Chinese GB compliance documentation. GB 38031 (EV battery safety) and GB/T 34131 (BMS for energy storage stations) are not applicable to PNG conformity requirements.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代GB/T 36276成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。中国GB标准不被巴布亚新几内亚项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。中国BESS出口至巴布亚新几内亚，须在任何中国GB合规文件之外，从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。GB 38031（电动汽车电池安全）和GB/T 34131（储能电站电池管理系统）不适用于巴布亚新几内亚合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代GB/T 36276成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。中國GB標準不被巴布亞紐幾內亞項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。中國BESS出口至巴布亞紐幾內亞，須在任何中國GB合規文件之外，從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。GB 38031（電動汽車電池安全）和GB/T 34131（儲能電站電池管理系統）不適用於巴布亞紐幾內亞合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: PNG project owners, PPL connection agreements, and international development finance institutions active in PNG energy projects reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes. Exporters should: (a) verify the current NISIT regulated-product list for any mandatory pre-shipment conformity obligation; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to PNG BESS projects; (c) for off-grid applications — prevalent in PNG's rural highlands — also prepare IEC 63056 evidence; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or PPL connection agreement before committing to a test programme; (e) note that international development-finance lenders (ADB, World Bank, IFC) funding PNG energy projects may impose additional ESHS (Environmental, Social, Health and Safety) requirements referencing IEC 62619 and NFPA 855 as procurement conditions.
gap.zh: 关键差距：巴布亚新几内亚项目业主、PPL并网协议，以及在巴布亚新几内亚能源项目中活跃的国际发展融资机构，将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实NISIT现行受监管产品清单，确认是否存在强制装运前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至巴布亚新几内亚BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）对于巴布亚新几内亚农村高地普遍存在的离网应用，还须准备IEC 63056证据；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或PPL并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本；（e）注意为巴布亚新几内亚能源项目提供资金的国际发展融资贷款机构（亚行、世界银行、国际金融公司），可能以IEC 62619和NFPA 855作为采购条件，附加ESHS（环境、社会、健康与安全）要求。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：巴布亞紐幾內亞項目業主、PPL併網協議，以及在巴布亞紐幾內亞能源項目中活躍的國際發展融資機構，將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實NISIT現行受監管產品清單，確認是否存在強制裝運前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至巴布亞紐幾內亞BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）對於巴布亞紐幾內亞農村高地普遍存在的離網應用，還須準備IEC 63056證據；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或PPL併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本；（e）注意為巴布亞紐幾內亞能源項目提供資金的國際發展融資貸款機構（亞行、世界銀行、國際金融公司），可能以IEC 62619和NFPA 855作為採購條件，附加ESHS（環境、社會、健康與安全）要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where PPL connection agreements or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; NISIT mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with NISIT
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Papua New Guinea as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in PNG project specifications and PPL connection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for PNG project acceptance. For off-grid deployments — common in PNG's rural highlands — IEC 63056 evidence is additionally required. Verify NISIT current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, PPL, and any international development-finance lender before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，巴布亚新几内亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是巴布亚新几内亚项目规格和PPL并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足巴布亚新几内亚项目验收要求。对于在巴布亚新几内亚农村高地普遍存在的离网部署，还需额外提供IEC 63056证据。出货前请核实NISIT现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、PPL及任何国际发展融资贷款机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，巴布亞紐幾內亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是巴布亞紐幾內亞項目規格和PPL併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足巴布亞紐幾內亞項目驗收要求。對於在巴布亞紐幾內亞農村高地普遍存在的離網部署，還需額外提供IEC 63056證據。出貨前請核實NISIT現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、PPL及任何國際發展融資貸款機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。

requirement_topic.en: BESS Battery Management System (BMS) Safety — IEC 62933-5-2 and System-Level Requirements for PNG
requirement_topic.zh: BESS电池管理系统（BMS）安全——IEC 62933-5-2及巴布亚新几内亚系统级要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS電池管理系統（BMS）安全——IEC 62933-5-2及巴布亞紐幾內亞系統級要求

summary.en: At the system level, IEC 62933-5-2 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems) sets the international baseline for BMS safety functions, protection circuit requirements, thermal management, and overall BESS system safety. For PNG projects — particularly off-grid and microgrid installations in remote locations — robust BMS performance under tropical operating conditions is critical because proximity to qualified service technicians cannot be assumed. BMS safety functions required under IEC 62933-5-2 include over-voltage protection, under-voltage protection, over-current protection, short-circuit protection, over-temperature protection, cell balancing, state-of-charge monitoring, and fault communication. PNG project specifications and PPL connection agreements are expected to reference IEC 62933-5-2 for grid-connected BESS system safety. Additional IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) evidence may be required by project owners or international development-finance lenders.
summary.zh: 在系统层面，IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统——安全要求——电化学系统）为BMS安全功能、保护电路要求、热管理和整体BESS系统安全设定了国际基准。对于巴布亚新几内亚项目——尤其是偏远地区的离网和微电网装置——在热带运行条件下具有稳健BMS性能至关重要，因为无法预设邻近合格维修技术人员。IEC 62933-5-2要求的BMS安全功能包括过压保护、欠压保护、过流保护、短路保护、过温保护、电芯均衡、荷电状态监测及故障通信。巴布亚新几内亚项目规格和PPL并网协议预计将引用IEC 62933-5-2作为并网BESS系统安全依据。项目业主或国际发展融资贷款机构可能还要求提供IEC 62933-5-1:2024（危害识别、风险评估与风险缓解）证据。
summary.zht: 在系統層面，IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統——安全要求——電化學系統）為BMS安全功能、保護電路要求、熱管理和整體BESS系統安全設定了國際基準。對於巴布亞紐幾內亞項目——尤其是偏遠地區的離網和微電網裝置——在熱帶運行條件下具有穩健BMS性能至關重要，因為無法預設鄰近合格維修技術人員。IEC 62933-5-2要求的BMS安全功能包括過壓保護、欠壓保護、過流保護、短路保護、過溫保護、電芯均衡、荷電狀態監測及故障通訊。巴布亞紐幾內亞項目規格和PPL併網協議預計將引用IEC 62933-5-2作為併網BESS系統安全依據。項目業主或國際發展融資貸款機構可能還要求提供IEC 62933-5-1:2024（危害識別、風險評估與風險緩解）證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level BMS and BESS safety standard)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification

summary.en: Chinese BMS requirements for stationary BESS are governed by GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management Systems of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Stations) and GB/T 36558-2023 (system-level general technical requirements). These Chinese standards cover equivalent BMS safety functions — over-voltage, under-voltage, over-current, over-temperature protection, balancing, SOC monitoring, and communication — but are structured differently from IEC 62933-5-2 and are not accepted as equivalent in PNG project specifications. Chinese BMS firmware and communication protocols are typically configured for China's 220/380 V grid and GB/T standard communication interfaces, which require modification for PNG's 240/415 V grid and any PPL-specified communication protocol (e.g., IEC 61850 or Modbus TCP).
summary.zh: 中国固定式BESS的BMS要求由GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范）和GB/T 36558-2023（系统级通用技术要求）管控。上述中国标准涵盖等效的BMS安全功能——过压、欠压、过流、过温保护，均衡、SOC监测和通信——但结构与IEC 62933-5-2不同，不被巴布亚新几内亚项目规格接受为等效依据。中国BMS固件和通信协议通常针对中国220/380 V电网和GB/T标准通信接口进行配置，须针对巴布亚新几内亚240/415 V电网及任何PPL规定的通信协议（如IEC 61850或Modbus TCP）进行修改。
summary.zht: 中國固定式BESS的BMS要求由GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能電站用電池管理系統技術規範）和GB/T 36558-2023（系統級通用技術要求）管控。上述中國標準涵蓋等效的BMS安全功能——過壓、欠壓、過流、過溫保護，均衡、SOC監測和通訊——但結構與IEC 62933-5-2不同，不被巴布亞紐幾內亞項目規格接受為等效依據。中國BMS韌體和通訊協議通常針對中國220/380 V電網和GB/T標準通訊接口進行配置，須針對巴布亞紐幾內亞240/415 V電網及任何PPL規定的通訊協議（如IEC 61850或Modbus TCP）進行修改。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能电站用电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management Systems of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Stations)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 34131 BMS documentation and GB/T 36558 system-level certification are not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 in PNG project specifications. Additionally, BMS firmware must be re-parameterised for PNG's 240/415 V grid before commissioning. For remote off-grid PNG installations, BMS must be designed for autonomous safe operation without real-time external intervention — this increases the criticality of thermal runaway detection and emergency shutdown functions. Exporters should: (a) obtain IEC 62933-5-2 evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) confirm BMS communication protocol compatibility with PPL's requirements before equipment procurement; (c) verify that BMS thermal protection thresholds are appropriate for PNG's tropical ambient temperatures (25–35°C at low elevation) to avoid nuisance tripping or thermal event risk; (d) prepare a Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA) or equivalent safety analysis demonstrating safe operation under PNG's tropical environmental conditions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 34131 BMS文件和GB/T 36558系统级认证不被巴布亚新几内亚项目规格接受为IEC 62933-5-2的等效依据。此外，BMS固件须在调试前针对巴布亚新几内亚240/415 V电网重新进行参数配置。对于巴布亚新几内亚偏远离网装置，BMS须设计为在无实时外部干预的情况下能自主安全运行——这提高了热失控探测和紧急停机功能的关键性。出口商应：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62933-5-2证据；（b）在设备采购前确认BMS通信协议与PPL要求的兼容性；（c）核实BMS热保护阈值对巴布亚新几内亚热带环境温度（低海拔25–35°C）是否适当，以避免误动或热事件风险；（d）准备失效模式与影响分析（FMEA）或等效安全分析，证明在巴布亚新几内亚热带环境条件下安全运行。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 34131 BMS文件和GB/T 36558系統級認證不被巴布亞紐幾內亞項目規格接受為IEC 62933-5-2的等效依據。此外，BMS韌體須在調試前針對巴布亞紐幾內亞240/415 V電網重新進行參數配置。對於巴布亞紐幾內亞偏遠離網裝置，BMS須設計為在無實時外部干預的情況下能自主安全運行——這提高了熱失控探測和緊急停機功能的關鍵性。出口商應：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62933-5-2證據；（b）在設備採購前確認BMS通訊協議與PPL要求的兼容性；（c）核實BMS熱保護閾值對巴布亞紐幾內亞熱帶環境溫度（低海拔25–35°C）是否適當，以避免誤動或熱事件風險；（d）準備失效模式與影響分析（FMEA）或等效安全分析，證明在巴布亞紐幾內亞熱帶環境條件下安全運行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where PPL or project-owner specifications reference IEC 62933-5-2; NISIT mandatory regulatory scope for BMS not confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with NISIT
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific — GB/T 34131-2023 is the applicable Chinese standard for energy storage station BMS; not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 in PNG

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 34131 BMS documentation is not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 in Papua New Guinea project specifications. BMS firmware must also be re-parameterised for PNG's 240/415 V grid. For remote off-grid PNG installations, robust autonomous BMS safe-operation design is essential given the absence of proximate emergency response. Obtain IEC 62933-5-2 evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and confirm BMS communication protocol compatibility with PPL before equipment procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 34131 BMS文件不被巴布亚新几内亚项目规格接受为IEC 62933-5-2的等效依据。BMS固件还须针对巴布亚新几内亚240/415 V电网重新进行参数配置。对于巴布亚新几内亚偏远离网装置，鉴于缺乏邻近应急响应，稳健的自主BMS安全运行设计至关重要。在设备采购前，从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62933-5-2证据，并确认BMS通信协议与PPL的兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 34131 BMS文件不被巴布亞紐幾內亞項目規格接受為IEC 62933-5-2的等效依據。BMS韌體還須針對巴布亞紐幾內亞240/415 V電網重新進行參數配置。對於巴布亞紐幾內亞偏遠離網裝置，鑑於缺乏鄰近應急響應，穩健的自主BMS安全運行設計至關重要。在設備採購前，從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62933-5-2證據，並確認BMS通訊協議與PPL的兼容性。

requirement_topic.en: Thermal Runaway Propagation Prevention — IEC 62619 and NFPA 855 Requirements for PNG BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 热失控蔓延预防——巴布亚新几内亚BESS的IEC 62619和NFPA 855要求
requirement_topic.zht: 熱失控蔓延預防——巴布亞紐幾內亞BESS的IEC 62619和NFPA 855要求

summary.en: Thermal runaway propagation prevention is a critical safety requirement for lithium-ion BESS installations worldwide. IEC 62619:2022 includes requirements for thermal runaway containment testing at the cell and module level. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) addresses thermal runaway propagation at the system and installation level — including separation distances, ventilation or gas-detection requirements, and fire suppression provisions. In PNG's context, thermal runaway risk is elevated by the tropical ambient temperatures (25–35°C at low elevations) and high humidity, which accelerate cell degradation and increase thermal stress. For off-grid PNG installations in remote locations, the absence of proximate fire brigade response makes robust passive thermal runaway containment design especially critical. PNG does not have its own specific BESS thermal runaway propagation standard; IEC 62619 and NFPA 855 serve as the international reference framework.
summary.zh: 热失控蔓延预防是全球锂离子BESS装置的关键安全要求。IEC 62619:2022包含电芯和模组层面的热失控围堵测试要求。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）在系统和安装层面处理热失控蔓延问题——包括隔离距离、通风或气体探测要求及消防抑制规定。在巴布亚新几内亚的背景下，热带环境温度（低海拔25–35°C）和高湿度加速电芯退化并增加热应力，热失控风险更高。对于偏远地区的巴布亚新几内亚离网装置，缺乏邻近消防队应急响应，使稳健的被动热失控围堵设计尤为关键。巴布亚新几内亚没有自己专属的BESS热失控蔓延标准；IEC 62619和NFPA 855作为国际参考框架。
summary.zht: 熱失控蔓延預防是全球鋰離子BESS裝置的關鍵安全要求。IEC 62619:2022包含電芯和模組層面的熱失控圍堵測試要求。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）在系統和安裝層面處理熱失控蔓延問題——包括隔離距離、通風或氣體探測要求及消防抑制規定。在巴布亞紐幾內亞的背景下，熱帶環境溫度（低海拔25–35°C）和高濕度加速電芯退化並增加熱應力，熱失控風險更高。對於偏遠地區的巴布亞紐幾內亞離網裝置，缺乏鄰近消防隊應急響應，使穩健的被動熱失控圍堵設計尤為關鍵。巴布亞紐幾內亞沒有自己專屬的BESS熱失控蔓延標準；IEC 62619和NFPA 855作為國際參考框架。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (thermal runaway containment testing at cell and module level)
NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (system-level thermal runaway propagation, separation distances, ventilation, suppression)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 includes thermal runaway propagation test requirements for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover thermal management requirements at the module and system level. Chinese standards address thermal runaway at the product level but do not provide installation-level requirements equivalent to NFPA 855 for separation distances and suppression design. Chinese domestic fire-safety standards (GB 50016, GB 50116) govern installation-level fire safety in China but are not recognised in PNG. Exporters must supplement Chinese thermal runaway test evidence with IEC 62619-compliant documentation and NFPA 855-aligned installation design for PNG project acceptance.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的热失控蔓延测试要求。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023在模组和系统层面覆盖热管理要求。中国标准在产品层面处理热失控问题，但未提供等同于NFPA 855关于隔离距离和抑制设计的安装层面要求。中国国内消防安全标准（GB 50016、GB 50116）管控中国国内安装层面的消防安全，但在巴布亚新几内亚不被认可。出口商须在中国热失控测试证据之外，补充符合IEC 62619的文件和符合NFPA 855的安装设计，以满足巴布亚新几内亚项目验收要求。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的熱失控蔓延測試要求。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023在模組和系統層面覆蓋熱管理要求。中國標準在產品層面處理熱失控問題，但未提供等同於NFPA 855關於隔離距離和抑制設計的安裝層面要求。中國國內消防安全標準（GB 50016、GB 50116）管控中國國內安裝層面的消防安全，但在巴布亞紐幾內亞不被認可。出口商須在中國熱失控測試證據之外，補充符合IEC 62619的文件和符合NFPA 855的安裝設計，以滿足巴布亞紐幾內亞項目驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — includes thermal runaway propagation test requirements at cell/module level
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (system-level thermal management)
GB 50016 — 建筑设计防火规范 (Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings — China domestic, not applicable to PNG)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB-standard thermal runaway test evidence does not satisfy IEC 62619 or NFPA 855 requirements for PNG project acceptance. The thermal runaway risk is compounded in PNG's tropical environment, which increases cell degradation rates and ambient thermal stress. Exporters and project designers should: (a) obtain IEC 62619:2022 thermal runaway propagation test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific cell and module configuration being supplied to PNG; (b) design BESS containment systems to NFPA 855 separation distance and ventilation requirements — engage a fire protection engineer experienced in NFPA 855 for PNG project design; (c) derate maximum ambient temperature limits and thermal management capacity for PNG's tropical conditions (25–35°C ambient at low elevation); (d) for remote off-grid PNG installations, ensure passive thermal containment is designed to prevent propagation to adjacent modules without requiring active suppression intervention, given that fire brigade response times in remote PNG locations may be hours or unavailable.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB标准热失控测试证据不满足巴布亚新几内亚项目验收的IEC 62619或NFPA 855要求。在巴布亚新几内亚热带环境中，热失控风险因电芯退化速率加快和环境热应力增加而更为突出。出口商和项目设计方应：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至巴布亚新几内亚的特定电芯和模组配置的IEC 62619:2022热失控蔓延测试证据；（b）按NFPA 855隔离距离和通风要求设计BESS围护系统——聘请熟悉NFPA 855的消防工程师进行巴布亚新几内亚项目设计；（c）针对巴布亚新几内亚热带条件（低海拔环境温度25–35°C）对最高环境温度限值和热管理容量进行降额；（d）对于巴布亚新几内亚偏远离网装置，鉴于偏远地区消防队响应时间可能需要数小时甚至无法响应，须确保被动热围堵设计能在无需主动抑制干预的情况下阻止蔓延至相邻模组。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB標準熱失控測試證據不滿足巴布亞紐幾內亞項目驗收的IEC 62619或NFPA 855要求。在巴布亞紐幾內亞熱帶環境中，熱失控風險因電芯退化速率加快和環境熱應力增加而更為突出。出口商和項目設計方應：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至巴布亞紐幾內亞的特定電芯和模組配置的IEC 62619:2022熱失控蔓延測試證據；（b）按NFPA 855隔離距離和通風要求設計BESS圍護系統——聘請熟悉NFPA 855的消防工程師進行巴布亞紐幾內亞項目設計；（c）針對巴布亞紐幾內亞熱帶條件（低海拔環境溫度25–35°C）對最高環境溫度限值和熱管理容量進行降額；（d）對於巴布亞紐幾內亞偏遠離網裝置，鑑於偏遠地區消防隊響應時間可能需要數小時甚至無法響應，須確保被動熱圍堵設計能在無需主動抑制干預的情況下阻止蔓延至相鄰模組。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — IEC 62619 thermal runaway containment testing is required for project acceptance; NFPA 855 installation design is expected by project owners and international development-finance lenders active in PNG
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 includes thermal runaway propagation test requirements; Chinese installation-level fire standards (GB 50016) apply domestically but not in PNG

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB-standard thermal runaway test evidence alone is not accepted for PNG project acceptance. IEC 62619:2022 thermal runaway propagation test evidence and NFPA 855-aligned installation design are required. PNG's tropical ambient temperatures (25–35°C) and high humidity increase thermal stress on BESS cells — derate thermal management capacity accordingly. For remote off-grid PNG deployments, passive thermal containment capable of preventing propagation without active suppression is essential given potential hours-long fire brigade response times.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅凭中国GB标准热失控测试证据不足以满足巴布亚新几内亚项目验收要求。须提供IEC 62619:2022热失控蔓延测试证据和符合NFPA 855的安装设计。巴布亚新几内亚热带环境温度（25–35°C）和高湿度增加BESS电芯的热应力——须相应对热管理容量进行降额。对于巴布亚新几内亚偏远离网部署，鉴于消防队响应时间可能长达数小时，能在无主动抑制干预情况下阻止蔓延的被动热围堵设计至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅憑中國GB標準熱失控測試證據不足以滿足巴布亞紐幾內亞項目驗收要求。須提供IEC 62619:2022熱失控蔓延測試證據和符合NFPA 855的安裝設計。巴布亞紐幾內亞熱帶環境溫度（25–35°C）和高濕度增加BESS電芯的熱應力——須相應對熱管理容量進行降額。對於巴布亞紐幾內亞偏遠離網部署，鑑於消防隊響應時間可能長達數小時，能在無主動抑制干預情況下阻止蔓延的被動熱圍堵設計至關重要。
